query:
-- Create new customer records for unmatched services
INSERT INTO customers (externalId, name, businessName, contactEmail, status, billingPlatform, dataSource, notes)
VALUES

FROM services WHERE externalId LIKE 'RVC-STUB-%' ORDER BY externalId;
